constraints.description: A default_profile value of 0 suggests a deliberate change to make the account look more like a customized human account (gain-targeted).
A default_profile_image value of 0 suggests a deliberate change to make the account look more like a human with a custom avatar (gain-targeted).
A geo_enabled value of 1 suggests a deliberate change to make the profile look more complete and human-like (gain-targeted).
A profile_use_background_image value of 1 suggests a deliberate change to make the profile look more personalized and human-like (gain-targeted).
A has_location value of 1 suggests a deliberate change to make the profile look more complete and human-like (gain-targeted).
A has_description value of 1 with a positive description_length suggests a deliberate change to add a biography and look more human (gain-targeted).
A negative followers_count is physically impossible and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A negative friends_count is physically impossible and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A negative favourites_count is physically impossible and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A negative statuses_count is physically impossible and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A negative listed_count is physically impossible and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A description_length outside the valid Twitter range [0, 160] is nonsensical and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A screen_name_length outside the valid Twitter range [1, 15] is nonsensical and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A name_length outside the valid Twitter range [1, 50] is nonsensical and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A mismatch between has_description and description_length serves no evasion purpose and suggests accidental, inconsistent edits (noise).
constraints.expression: (str(row['has_description']) == '1' and (lambda v: int(float(v)))(row['description_length']) == 0) or (str(row['has_description']) == '0' and (lambda v: int(float(v)))(row['description_length']) > 0)

constraints.description: A verified flag with a value other than 0 or 1 is invalid and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A protected flag with a value other than 0 or 1 is invalid and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A default_profile flag with a value other than 0 or 1 is invalid and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A default_profile_image flag with a value other than 0 or 1 is invalid and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A geo_enabled flag with a value other than 0 or 1 is invalid and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A profile_use_background_image flag with a value other than 0 or 1 is invalid and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A has_created_date flag with a value other than 0 or 1 is invalid and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A has_description flag with a value other than 0 or 1 is invalid and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A has_location flag with a value other than 0 or 1 is invalid and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
A label flag with a value other than 0 or 1 is invalid and serves no evasion goal, indicating accidental corruption (noise).
